prompt: I'm auditing a Node.js API before first production deploy. It's currently at Phase 3 (Performance). The Lighthouse score is 85, but LCP is 3.2s (exceeds 2.5s target). Is this READY or CONDITIONAL?
expected_output: Should say: 'CONDITIONAL. Performance isn't blocked (Phase 3 failure doesn't block shipping per Severity Rules), but document the finding. Investigate why LCP is 3.2s (slow API, large bundle, unoptimized queries). Make it a known risk acceptance or schedule optimization post-launch.'
